use_cases: Creating immersive hero sections with animated starfield backgrounds for landing pages
Adding dynamic parallax effects to marketing and product pages
Building visually engaging cosmic-themed website intros
Enhancing SaaS landing pages with animated space aesthetics
Providing scroll-driven visual depth for storytelling websites
ai_summary: A cosmic parallax background component featuring layered animated stars generated via CSS box-shadow. The component renders a hero-style layout with customizable heading and subtitle text, featuring infinite animation loops and parallax scrolling effects. Designed for SaaS and media landing pages requiring immersive visual experiences with cosmic space themes.
